---
title: "Doxycycline_correlations"
output: html_document
date: "2025-09-22"
params:
  outdir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/results/
  mae_hdf5_path: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/h5MAE
  config_file: 'config.yml'
---

```{r show_parameters}
print(params)
dir.create(params$outdir)
outdir <- params$outdir

# If outdir not exists set to current dir
if (!dir.exists(outdir)){
    outdir <- getwd()
}
```


## Libraries
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(pheatmap)
```


## Read input data

```{r read_input_data, message=FALSE}
library(MultiAssayExperiment)
library(HDF5Array)

mae <- loadHDF5MultiAssayExperiment(
  dir = params$mae_hdf5_path, 
  prefix = 'mae'
)
names(mae)
```


## Retrieve omics data frame
```{r}
assay_name <- "Metabolomics, LUMC | unfiltered"

se <- experiments(mae)[assay_name]
df <- as.data.frame(t(assays(se)[[1]]))

# Feature metadata
feature_metadata <- as.data.frame(rowData(mae[[assay_name]]))
```


## Doxycyline analysis
#TODO only positive mode metabolite
```{r}
column_doxy <- 'pos_2595' #Doxycycline

correlate_with_base_column <- function(df, column_name, p_adjust_method = "BH") {
  
  results <- data.frame(Feature = character(), 
                        Correlation = numeric(), 
                        Pval = numeric(),
                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  for (col in colnames(df)) {
    if ( col != column_name) {
      cor_test <- cor.test(df[[column_name]], df[[col]], use = "complete.obs")
      cor_value <- cor_test$estimate
      p_value <- cor_test$p.value
    }
    
    results <- rbind(results, data.frame(Feature = col, 
                                         Correlation = cor_value,
                                         Pval = p_value))

  }
  results$Padj <- p.adjust(results$Pval, method = p_adjust_method)
  
  return(data.frame(results))
}


result_doxy <- correlate_with_base_column(df, column_doxy)
plot(sort(result_doxy$Correlation))
```

```{r}
result_doxy_sign <- result_doxy[result_doxy$Padj <= 0.05,]

plot(sort(result_doxy_sign$Correlation))

```

## Same plots with only pos ion mode data
```{r}
df_pos <- df[,startsWith(x = colnames(df), prefix = 'pos')]
result_doxy_pos <- correlate_with_base_column(df_pos, column_doxy)

plot(sort(result_doxy_pos$Correlation))
```

```{r}
result_doxy_pos_sign <- result_doxy_pos[result_doxy_pos$Padj <= 0.05,]

plot(sort(result_doxy_pos_sign$Correlation))
```

## Print top 50 correlating metabolites
```{r}
Doxy_cor_pos_top25 <- result_doxy_pos_sign[order(result_doxy_pos_sign$Correlation, decreasing = TRUE), ][1:25,]
Doxy_cor_neg_top25 <- result_doxy_pos_sign[order(result_doxy_pos_sign$Correlation, decreasing = FALSE),][1:25,]

Combined_df <- rbind(Doxy_cor_neg_top25, Doxy_cor_pos_top25)
feature_metadata_sub <- feature_metadata[Combined_df$Feature,]
Combined_df <- cbind(Combined_df, feature_metadata_sub)
write.csv(Combined_df, file.path(outdir, 'Doxy_top_correlation.csv'))
```


## Glutamine analysis
#TODO only positive mode metabolite
```{r}
column_gluta <- 'pos_1799' #Glutamine

result_gluta_pos <- correlate_with_base_column(df, column_gluta)
result_gluta_pos_sign <- result_gluta_pos[result_gluta_pos$Padj <= 0.05,]

plot(sort(result_gluta_pos_sign$Correlation))
```

```{r}
Gluta_cor_pos_top25 <- result_gluta_pos[order(result_gluta_pos$Correlation, decreasing = TRUE), ][1:25,]
Gluta_cor_neg_top25 <- result_gluta_pos[order(result_gluta_pos$Correlation, decreasing = FALSE),][1:25,]

Combined_df <- rbind(Gluta_cor_pos_top25, Gluta_cor_neg_top25)
feature_metadata_sub <- feature_metadata[Combined_df$Feature,]
Combined_df <- cbind(Combined_df, feature_metadata_sub)
write.csv(Combined_df, file.path(outdir, 'Gluta_top_correlation.csv'))
```


Correlations with other metabolic features mapped to glutamine
```{r}
cor(df$pos_1799, df$pos_1901)
plot(df$pos_1799, df$pos_1901)
```


```{r}
cor(df$pos_1799, df$pos_1708)
plot(df$pos_1799, df$pos_1708)

```


```{r}
# Correlation matrix on all features
cor_matrix <- cor(df, use = "complete.obs")

mean_cor_df <- apply(cor_matrix, 2, function(x) mean(abs(x[x != 1])))

sorted_features <- sort(mean_cor_df, decreasing = TRUE)

top100_features <- names(sorted_features)[1:3000]

#column_doxy %in% top100_features
```
